name: Syntec Construction Public Company Limited
summary: Syntec Construction Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in real estate development and construction activities in Thailand. The company undertakes residential, commercial, institutional, leisure, retail, industrial, and infrastructure projects. It is also involved in the real estate development for apartment service and rental; management of hotels, service apartments, and other properties; and procurement and installation of sanitation systems, electrical systems, and communications and air systems, as well as provision of consulting services. The company was formerly known as Siam Syntech Construction Public Company Limited and changed its name to Syntec Construction Public Company Limited in April 2004. Syntec Construction Public Company Limited was founded in 1988 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
